name: Brick Breaker Maker
short_description: Brick Breaker Maker is a rich, element-based Arkanoid game in which you need to flexibly control the baffle to bounce the ball and break the bricks to win. The game provides level editor that can be shared in the workshop to interact with other players, which is full of fun and competition.
detailed_description:
Brick Breaker Maker is a rich, element-based Arkanoid game in which you need to flexibly control the baffle to bounce the ball and accurately break the bricks to win. The game provides powerful level editing tools, allowing players to be creative and design levels.

Key features

The game has 12 chapters, 9 levels each, a total of 108 well-designed levels, each with a unique brick layout and challenges.

Includes

  • 20 unique power-ups, covering a wide range of special effects such as buffs and debuffs.

  • 20special bricks, with a wide variety of types, properties and effects.

  • 15types of mechanisms, which can be controlled with the mouse and are highly interactive and fun.

  • 15 creatures (including boss battles), which are either cute or dangerous, providing a diverse combat experience.

✦Rich game content and systems✦

In addition to exciting levels, there are also a thrilling prize machine, an exhaustive illustrated encyclopedia and a colorful skin system.

✦Level editor and creative workshop✦

You can freely use your creativity to design levels and share them in the creative workshop to interact with other players.

✦Global leaderboards✦

Both the built-in and Mod levels offer global leaderboards. Players can improve their ranking by challenging the fastest clearance time record and compete with players from all over the world.

This is a fun and challenging Arkanoid experience.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Indonesian, Turkish, Japanese, Polish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Korean, Spanish - Latin America
